description: Perform a data hygiene and schema migration task on the 'Hotels' class in the 'demodb' database. Standardize all 'City' field values to Title Case (e.g., 'Rome', 'Berlin'). Create a new property named 'Location' of type 'OPoint' and populate it for all records using the existing 'Latitude' and 'Longitude' values. Create a SPATIAL index on the 'Location' property. Ensure the new 'Location' column is fully populated and indexed while retaining the legacy Latitude and Longitude columns. Credentials: root / GymAnything123! or admin / admin.
